### REQUEST ###

```














{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842195278606858022
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "4:LEN": {
    "1:LEN": {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
      "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession, create_async_engine\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker\r\n\r\nfrom miniqueue.models import Base, Job, JobEvent, JobState\r\nfrom miniqueue.state_machine import InvalidStateTransition, transition_state\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\nasync def test_valid_transitions_create_events(tmp_path) -> None:\r\n    engine = create_async_engine(\"sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory:\", future=True)\r\n    async with engine.begin() as conn:\r\n        await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)\r\n\r\n    async_session = sessionmaker(engine, expire_on_commit=False, class_=AsyncSession)\r\n\r\n    async with async_session() as session:\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            job = Job(type=\"sleep\", queue=\"default\", payload={\"seconds\": 1.0})\r\n            session.add(job)\r\n\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"start\")\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.SUCCEEDED, \"done\")\r\n\r\n        # Reload and check events count and final state.\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            db_job = await session.get(Job, job.id)\r\n            assert db_job is not None\r\n            assert db_job.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED\r\n\r\n            result = await session.execute(\r\n                JobEvent.__table__.select().where(JobEvent.job_id == job.id)\r\n            )\r\n            events = list(result.fetchall())\r\n            assert len(events) == 2\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\nasync def test_invalid_transition_rejected(tmp_path) -> None:\r\n    engine = create_async_engine(\"sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory:\", future=True)\r\n    async with engine.begin() as conn:\r\n        await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)\r\n\r\n    async_session = sessionmaker(engine, expire_on_commit=False, class_=AsyncSession)\r\n\r\n    async with async_session() as session:\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            job = Job(type=\"sleep\", queue=\"default\", payload={\"seconds\": 1.0})\r\n            job.state = JobState.SUCCEEDED\r\n            session.add(job)\r\n\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            with pytest.raises(InvalidStateTransition):\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"should fail\")\r\n\r\n"
    },
    "2:LEN": "40cc1a0c58c6be1e4b4b5f21f18532bf66f3de370765b22dc412b7a1301ce527",
    "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
  },
  "5:LEN": [
    {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
    },
    {
      "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
    },
    {
      "1:LEN": "."
    }
  ],
  "6:VARINT": 1
}
```

29%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Btransition_state%2528session%252C%2Bjob%252C%2BJobState.RUNNING%252C%2B%255C%2522start%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Btransition_state%2528session%252C%2Bjob%252C%2BJobState.SUCCEEDED%252C%2B%255C%2522done%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BReload%2Band%2Bcheck%2Bevents%2Bcount%2Band%2Bfinal%2Bstate.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bsession.begin%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bdb_job%2B%253D%2Bawait%2Bsession.get%2528Job%252C%2Bjob.id%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bdb_job%2Bis%2Bnot%2BNone%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bdb_job.state%2B%253D%253D%2BJobState.SUCCEEDED%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bresult%2B%253D%2Bawait%2Bsession.execute%2528%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2BJobEvent.__table__.select%2528%2529.where%2528JobEvent.job_id%2B%253D%253D%2Bjob.id%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bevents%2B%253D%2Blist%2528result.fetchall%2528%2529%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Blen%2528events%2529%2B%253D%253D%2B2%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255CREDACTED%255Cr%255Cnasync%2Bdef%2Btest_invalid_transition_rejected%2528tmp_path%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bengine%2B%253D%2Bcreate_async_engine%2528%255C%2522sqlite%2Baiosqlite%253A%252F%252F%252F%253Amemory%253A%255C%2522%252C%2Bfuture%253DTrue%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bengine.begin%2528%2529%2Bas%2Bconn%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bconn.run_sync%2528Base.metadata.create_all%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync_session%2B%253D%2Bsessionmaker%2528engine%252C%2Bexpire_on_commit%253DFalse%252C%2Bclass_%253DAsyncSession%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Basync_session%2528%2529%2Bas%2Bsession%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bsession.begin%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob%2B%253D%2BJob%2528type%253D%255C%2522sleep%255C%2522%252C%2Bqueue%253D%255C%2522default%255C%2522%252C%2Bpayload%253D%257B%255C%2522seconds%255C%2522%253A%2B1.0%257D%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob.state%2B%253D%2BJobState.SUCCEEDED%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsession.add%2528job%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bsession.begin%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bwith%2Bpytest.raises%2528InvalidStateTransition%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Btransition_state%2528session%252C%2Bjob%252C%2BJobState.RUNNING%252C%2B%255C%2522should%2Bfail%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%252240cc1a0c58c6be1e4b4b5f21f18532bf66f3de370765b22dc412b7a1301ce527%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25225%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25226%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D
